creator: nickblack@linux.com
text:
Created attachment 226596
git diff 2.3.8 -> 2.3.11

Lots of bugfixes around systems lacking full Unicode 13 support, including FreeBSD. notcurses-info now runs properly on my FreeBSD 13.0 VM. Bugfixes relative to 2.3.8 include menu highlighting working again, the restoration of the 8x1 plotter, and a handler for SIGFPE along with the other fatal signals long handled. `XTPOPCOLORS` and `XTPUSHCOLORS` are now used to preserve the palette.

https://github.com/dankamongmen/notcurses/releases/tag/v2.3.11
https://github.com/dankamongmen/notcurses/releases/tag/v2.3.10
https://github.com/dankamongmen/notcurses/releases/tag/v2.3.9
